title: pilosella piloselloides subsp. bauhini
intro: Pilosella piloselloides subsp. bauhini, also known as Rough Hawk's Beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Pilosella piloselloides subsp. bauhini is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in salves or creams to support skin health and wound healing.
